titleStmt.title: SII 15.207: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 207. (B.K. No. 113 of 1926-27.) HOSŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the wall, right of entrance, of the Trikūṭēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1114, Paridhāvi, Kārttika-puṇṇami, Monday, corresponding to 1192 A.D., October 22. The weekday, however, was Thursday.

It records a gift of income derived from taxes, to Mahābaḷa-Gāvuṇḍa and the Seven Hundred by Vachchharasa, Māḷaparasa, Mādayya, (son) of Bīcharasa, the Hejjuṅka officer of Eraḍaṟunūṟu and others. The gift was made as a compensation for the destruction caused to the town of Hosavūru, when the king had camped there.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ vīraballāḷadēva
va¨rṣa 1114 neya paridhāvi saṁvatsarada kā¨rttika suddha
puṇnami sōmavāradalu hosavūralli bīḍaṁ biṭṭu ka
ḍidu kiḍisidalli vaccharasa māḷaparasagaḷuṁ Eraḍaṟu
nūṟara hajjuṁkada yadhikāri bīcarasana mādayya
nuṁ kauṟūra bammayyanuṁ yavara pratihastaru nāga
rasa . Āppayyanuṁ . yi¨rdā mahābaḷagāvuṁḍagaṁ
Ēḷu nū¨rvvarigaṁ māratōṁṭa nirākuḷe keṭṭaḍe
Aḍakeya kuḷiya suṁkamumaṁ . Eleya lakka
lokkamumaṁ . sa¨rvvābādhaparihāravāgi yācaṁ
drā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ salvantāgi biṭṭaru . Ida nāḍanāḷva A
rasugaḷuṁ suṁkave¨rggaḍegaḷuṁ pratipāḷisu
veru . Idanaḷideheneṁdu manaṁdaṁdavarige vāra
ṇāsi kurukṣētradali sāvira kavile sāvira brāhmaṇa
rumanaḷida paṁcamahāpātakarakku .
Digital edition of SII 15.207 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
